heroHeadline: EU Complaint Filed Over FIFA Ticket Prices; Iran-FIFA Talks Progressing — 69 Days to Kickoff
heroSubtitle: Football Supporters Europe and Euroconsumers filed a formal European Commission complaint against FIFA on April 3 for alleged abuse of dominant market position over ticket pricing, with Final seats reaching $10,990 face value; Iran-FIFA talks are progressing with Tucson confirmed as Iran's training base ahead of the April 30 FIFA Congress in Vancouver, where contingency planning must begin if Iran's government standoff continues; USMNT face mounting questions with Pulisic on an 8-match scoring drought and the May 26 roster announcement 53 days away.
footerNote: Data sourced from FIFA.com, UEFA.com, US Soccer, CONCACAF, ESPN, The Athletic, BBC Sport, AP, Reuters, NPR, Al Jazeera, Human Rights Watch, Amnesty International, American Immigration Council, Middle East Monitor, CBS Sports
